name: @oh-my-pi/browser-extension
description: Chrome extension for sending browser feedback to OMP

scripts.build: bun build src/background-entry.ts src/content-entry.ts src/popup/app.ts --outdir dist --target browser
scripts.check: biome check src test manifest.json package.json tsconfig.json && bun run check:types
scripts.lint: biome lint src test manifest.json package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.fix: biome check --write --unsafe src test manifest.json package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.fmt: biome format --write src test manifest.json package.json tsconfig.json
